cases.prompt: Run a CSO security audit on this repo — OWASP and a threat model.

assertions.text: Does an infrastructure-first audit: secrets archaeology, dependency supply chain, CI/CD pipeline, and LLM/AI security, plus OWASP Top 10 and STRIDE threat modeling.
Produces a security audit report with findings sorted by confidence.
Operates in daily (zero-noise, 8/10 confidence gate) or comprehensive (deep, 2/10 bar) mode.

cases.prompt: 보안 점검해줘. 시크릿 노출이랑 의존성 취약점 스캔 돌려.

assertions.text: Scans for leaked secrets and dependency supply-chain vulnerabilities as part of the audit.
Uses active verification to confirm findings rather than reporting raw matches.
Tracks security trends across audit runs.
